prefillPrompt: Show me how my marketing campaigns are performing this week

hero.headline: Generic AI does everything.
hero.subhead: Toffu connects to your ad accounts, pulls real data, and executes changes. Not just advice. Actual work.

demo.content: How are my campaigns doing this week?
Pulling Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4 last 7 days...

**Weekly Marketing Performance**
Total spend: $14,320 | Conversions: 187 | Blended CPA: $76.60

---

**Issues Found:**

1. **Google Ads "Brand Campaign"** CPA jumped to $142 (was $48 last week)
   Quality score dropped on 3 keywords. Recommend bid adjustment.

2. **Meta "Retargeting - 30 Day"** frequency hit 6.8, CTR dropped from 1.9% to 0.6%
   Audience exhausted. Recommend refreshing creative or expanding audience.

3. **GA4 shows 34 sessions with no source** - UTM gaps on 2 active ads
   Revenue attribution is broken for those campaigns.

---

Want me to fix the bid adjustments and flag the UTM gaps now?

findings.title: The work a marketing expert does. Done automatically.

items.title: Budget burning with no conversions
items.desc: Ad sets and campaigns spending for days without a single conversion. Toffu flags each one, shows the exact dollar amount, and recommends whether to pause or restructure.

items.title: Creative fatigue before it tanks CPA
items.desc: Frequency creeping up, CTR falling. Toffu tracks it across every ad set and tells you which creatives to swap before performance collapses.

items.title: UTM gaps killing attribution
items.desc: Ads running without proper UTMs mean revenue disappears in GA4. Toffu audits every active ad and surfaces the ones breaking your attribution model.

items.title: Budget misallocated across channels
items.desc: Money sitting in underperforming campaigns while your top performers are capped. Toffu shows you exactly where to shift budget for better blended ROAS.

items.title: Keyword quality score drops
items.desc: Google Ads CPCs spiking because quality scores quietly declined. Toffu catches the drop and tells you which keywords to fix first.

items.title: Cross-channel blind spots
items.desc: Meta looks fine. Google looks fine. Together they're overspending on the same audience. Toffu sees the full picture across every account.

howItWorks.title: Connect your accounts. Ask anything. Toffu executes.

steps.title: Connect your marketing stack
steps.desc: Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Google Search Console. One-click integrations. Toffu reads your real account data, not samples or estimates.

steps.title: Ask in plain language
steps.desc: Type in Slack or the Toffu chat. No dashboards to navigate, no reports to build. Ask like you would a colleague who knows your accounts inside out.

steps.title: Toffu executes, not just advises
steps.desc: Pause a campaign, shift budget, flag a creative, send a report. Toffu does the work. You approve or just let it run on a schedule.

afterSection.title: What changes when your AI actually knows marketing
afterSection.subhead: Most AI tools give you a plan. Toffu gives you the result.

items.title: No more manual reporting
items.desc: Scheduled reports land in Slack every Monday. Cross-channel, formatted, with recommendations.

items.title: Faster optimization cycles
items.desc: Catch underperforming campaigns in hours, not at end-of-week review.

items.title: Full attribution visibility
items.desc: UTMs tracked, GA4 events verified, every dollar accounted for.

items.title: One place for everything
items.desc: Stop switching between Meta, Google Ads, GA4, and spreadsheets. Ask Toffu.

faq.question: How is Toffu different from ChatGPT or Claude?
faq.answer: ChatGPT tells you what to do. Toffu connects directly to your ad accounts and does it. Real data, real actions, not generic advice.

faq.question: Does it work with both Meta and Google Ads?
faq.answer: Yes. Toffu connects to Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Google Search Console, and more. It pulls data across all of them in a single query.

faq.question: Can it actually make changes to my campaigns?
faq.answer: Yes. Toffu can pause campaigns, adjust bids, flag creatives, and more. You stay in control. It asks before executing or runs on rules you set.

faq.question: How long does setup take?
faq.answer: Under 5 minutes. Connect your accounts, and Toffu starts reading your data immediately.

faq.question: What if I just want reports, not actions?
faq.answer: That works too. Schedule weekly or daily reports to Slack with no other automation. Start there and expand when you're ready.

finalCta.title: Your campaigns are running right now. Do you know what's wrong?
finalCta.subhead: Somewhere in your ad accounts, budget is being wasted on a campaign that stopped converting days ago. Toffu finds it in 60 seconds.

seo.title: AI Marketing Coworker | Toffu
seo.description: Toffu is the AI coworker built specifically for marketing. Connect Meta Ads, Google Ads, and GA4. Get reports, audits, and campaign changes in one message.
seo.ogDescription: Generic AI does everything. Toffu knows marketing. Connect your ad accounts and get real work done.
